XOnlineTeamMembersEnumerate

Enumerates a team's members.

HRESULT XOnlineTeamMembersEnumerate(
    DWORD dwUserIndex,
    XUID xuidTeam,
    DWORD dwFlags,
    HANDLE hWorkEvent,
    PXONLINETASK_HANDLE phTask
);

Parameters

dwUserIndex
[in] Controller index (zero-based) of the player making the request.
xuidTeam
[in] XUID structure that uniquely identifies the team.
dwFlags
[in] Flags indicating how the team members should be enumerated.
Value Description
XONLINE_TEAM_SHOW_RECRUITS Indicates that recruits should be included in the returned results.
hWorkEvent
[in, optional] Handle to an event.
phTask
[out] Pointer to an XONLINETASK_HANDLE returned.

Return Values

Returns S_OK if successful, an error code otherwise.

Remarks

When the task completes, the title can call the XOnlineTeamMembersEnumerateGetResults function to retrieve a list of team member XUID structures and the XOnlineTeamMemberGetDetails function to retrieve details for a particular team member.

Requirements

Header: Declared in Xonline.h.

Import Library: Use Xonline.lib.

See Also

Xbox Live Functions
